newsletter.heading: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Stay in the loop – new releases, tour dates, and exclusive content delivered to your inbox.
newsletter.successMessage: We've sent you a confirmation email. Please click the link inside to complete your subscription.
newsletter.consentText: By subscribing, you agree to occasionally receive emails from darkTunes. You can unsubscribe at any time.

newsletter.confirmSuccessMessage: You're now subscribed to the darkTunes newsletter. Welcome to the community!

consent.bannerText: This website would like to embed content from external providers (Spotify, YouTube). By clicking "Accept", you consent to data being transferred to these third parties (GDPR Art. 6 para. 1 lit. a).

contact.heading: CONTACT
contact.subheading: Get in touch with darkTunes Music Group
contact.submitMusicDescription: Are you an artist or band looking to get your music heard? Submit your demos and releases directly via SubmitHub.
contact.messagePlaceholder: How can we help you? (min. 20 characters)
contact.gdprConsent: I agree to the processing of my personal data to handle this inquiry (GDPR Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b).
